scope: GSC-only SEO analysis for bariatriccounselingcenter.com, derived from 36 Search Console snapshots (2026-05-07 to 2026-06-24) and the 75-keyword master tracker. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are NOT auto-generated here.
wins: Core local cluster holds the top of page 1: bariatric surgery counseling san antonio #1, bariatric counseling san antonio #2, weight loss counseling san antonio #2, weight management therapist san antonio #3 (up from #4), emotional eating therapy san antonio #4 — 4 tracked terms sit in the #1-#3 tiers.

Strongest sustained climbers over the window (old->recent position): weight loss counseling san antonio 25.3->2.0, emotional eating therapy san antonio 23.0->4.0, weight loss therapy 38.8->6.0, and bariatric counseling 25.0->12.3.

Highest-impression content all ranks on page 1: the Wegovy/Ozempic/Zepbound medication guide pulled 910 impressions at avg position 9.8, the anxiety-and-depression-related-to-weight post 767 imp at 13.4, the better-sleep-for-weight-loss post 444 imp at 10.4, and the bariatric-surgery psychological-support guide 400 imp at 9.5.
Clicks are trending up across the window despite lower impressions: 2 clicks on 2026-05-07 vs 6 on 2026-06-24, peaking at 8 on 2026-06-22.
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 23 of 75 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 52 show none. This is a KEYWORD count, NOT a page count. Most of the 52 are long-tail/secondary terms that simply are not ranking yet; several 'not ranking' terms also point at staging URLs in the tracker, and those staging-targeted pointers are most likely stale tracker hygiene (the page is already live on www) rather than lost traffic.

Visibility drift over the full window: impressions 2447 (2026-05-07) -> 1684 (2026-06-24) and avg position 14.87 -> 19.86. The 05-07 figure is an outlier high; recent weeks are stable (~1680-1700 imp) and position actually improved from ~22-27 in late May to ~18.5 mid-June before ticking to 19.86 on 06-24. Single-impression positions swing day to day and are directional only.

Near-zero CTR: 6 clicks on 1,684 impressions in the latest snapshot (~0.36%). The biggest blog earners convert worst — the Wegovy/Ozempic medication guide drew 910 impressions but only 2 clicks, and the anxiety-and-depression post 767 impressions for 2 clicks.

Slipped commercial terms with real impressions: eating disorder therapist san antonio fell 13.0 -> 19.6 (delta -6.6, 11 imp) and eating disorder treatment san antonio drifted 19.2 -> 39.0 over the window. (san antonio bariatric center shows 10.5 -> 41.5 but on ~1 impression — a single-impression swing, directional only.)
priority_actions: Keyword-tracker hygiene: of 49 distinct target pages in keywords-master.json, 7 still point at staging12 URLs (bariatric-counseling-near-me, eating-disorder-therapist-near-me, intuitive-eating-support-in-mcallen-tx, san-antonio-bariatric-center, weight-loss-counseling-or-therapy, what-is-a-bariatric-counselor, what-is-a-weight-loss-counselor). Repoint these to their live www URLs so GSC can match impressions. Note: staging-targeted does NOT mean unpublished — most are already live.

Data-hygiene fix applied this run: keywords-master.json had a UTF-8 BOM that broke today's fetch (gsc-fetch.py and seo-impact.py both failed to parse it) until the BOM was stripped. Keep this file saved as UTF-8 WITHOUT BOM so future scheduled fetches do not silently fall back to stale snapshots.

Fix CTR on high-impression blog posts: add clear CTAs and internal links from the Wegovy/Ozempic medication guide (910 imp), the anxiety-and-depression post (767 imp), and the better-sleep post (444 imp) into the matching bariatric/weight-management service pages, and tighten titles/meta for click appeal.

On-page refresh to defend slipped terms: rework the page targeting eating disorder therapist / treatment san antonio to recover the -6.6 drift, and defend the core local #1-#3 terms (bariatric counseling SA, weight loss counseling SA, bariatric surgery counseling SA, weight management therapist SA).

Add/confirm FAQ schema on service pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility. If a staging->prod publish backlog is suspected, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's own notes rather than inferring a count from keyword/GSC data.
summary: GSC-only scope: 23 of 75 tracked keywords show impressions (a keyword count, not a page count; 49 distinct target pages, 7 still pointing at staging in the tracker). The local core cluster is strong (bariatric surgery counseling SA #1, three more local terms in #2-#4), but overall impressions are flat-to-soft and CTR is near zero (6 clicks / 1,684 imp), with eating disorder therapist san antonio the most-slipped commercial term (-6.6). Competitor and AI-visibility sections remain manual.
